original_query: select min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number) FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01 ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM customer
JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk 
    AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
JOIN store_sales ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.8 * ss_list_price AND 1.0 * ss_list_price
JOIN store_returns ON ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
JOIN date_dim d1 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND d1.d_year = 1999
JOIN web_sales ON ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_item_sk = ws_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day)

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Rewrote ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.8 AND 1.0 to ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.8 * ss_list_price AND 1.0 * ss_list_price to avoid division operation
Reordered joins to start with customer tables and apply restrictive filters (ca_state, hd_income_band_sk) early
Moved all filter conditions into the JOIN clauses where possible to enable early filtering
